title: rubus hybridus
intro: Rubus hybridus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or bramble, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubus genus and is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as arthritis, digestive problems, and wounds, due to its potential health benefits in reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Rubus hybridus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, as well as being used fresh in salads and jams.
